text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki and I are heading back home after a
day out.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I want to properly thank you for accompanying
me to that exhibition a while back.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What do you say to checking out that event that
was on the flyer on your desk?

I remember that leaflet. They're apparently
holding an immersive "escape room" experience
at the shopping mall.

Participants who manage to escape from a cast of
zombies within the time limit can receive a prize.

It caught my attention because the list of prizes
includes a new model of shoes designed
specifically for Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
We can go together. I'm a pretty great runner,
after all!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'll pay you back with an incredible victory!

There's no way I can refuse her offer, so we hurry
off to the event!

text_block_list.name: Event Staff
text_block_list.text:
Illegal and dangerous actions are forbidden! Now
that we're clear on that, go out there and have
some fun!

text_block_list.name: Event Staff
text_block_list.text: Are you all ready? Let's begin!

text_block_list.name: Zombies
text_block_list.text: Graaah!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Wow, their makeup is impeccab—I mean, what
scary zombies!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
They're all so fast. I wonder if the cast
mem—ahem! I wonder if those zombies were
Umamusume when they were alive.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh, here they come! Let's get out of here
quietly!

text_block_list.name: Male Participant
text_block_list.text:
No, please! Don't come any closer! There's only
ten minutes left! Gaaah!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe, looks like he's out!

text_block_list.name: Female Participant
text_block_list.text: An entire horde's coming this way! Run away!

text_block_list.name: Zombies
text_block_list.text: Raaah!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
This doesn't look good! We have to get out of
here fast! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Where are we? Hm, I can see the first floor from
the balcony, so we must be on the second floor.
We need to find a hiding spot fast.

text_block_list.name: Zombies
text_block_list.text: Graaah!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: We've been found! That way, quick!

text_block_list.name: Zombies
text_block_list.text: Grrr!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: A pincer attack?! This is bad...

We find ourselves surrounded by zombies. It'll be
hard enough for Fuji Kiseki alone to get away,
much less both of us!

I rack my brains for a solution. To ensure her safe
escape and victory, I have to...
choice_data_list: Pick up Fuji Kiseki and jump to the first floor.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You want to jump down there?!

text_block_list.name: Zombies
text_block_list.text: Grrr!

The zombies are nearly upon us. There's no time
to explain. I pick her up and hold her securely.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer?!
I leap! And we land on the first floor.

text_block_list.name: Event Staff
text_block_list.text:
Wow, what a dramatic escape! And your
companion is completely unharmed!

text_block_list.name: Event Staff
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, dangerous acts are forbidden, so
you're disqualified!

Thus, the event ends and we leave empty-handed
due to my overenthusiasm.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Don't give me that look! Hold out your ankle so I
can put a compress on it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you actually did that. If you told
me what you planned to do, I could've...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You carried me and jumped yourself because you
didn't want me to hurt my legs, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It all makes sense now... I was wondering why you
were being so pushy.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Goodness... You really are something else.
Her tender expression belies her harsh words.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm usually the one protecting others, not the one
being protected...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And in the rare cases when I have been shielded, I
always felt so bad about it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But with you... I don't know what it is, but it feels
different with you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I feel nothing but joy right now. Thank you for
protecting me. From the bottom of my heart.
She steps closer to me...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That aside, you're still injured. As punishment, I'm
giving you a piggyback ride all the way home!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Stop flailing about! This is what you get for being
so reckless.

Fuji Kiseki walks into the sunset with me on her
back. I can't see her face, but I can feel the
happiness radiating off her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You?! As bait?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
No! Absolutely not! I can't let you do that! If
anyone's going to be bait, it'll be m—
choice_data_list:
You can make it! You can escape, but only if
you go alone!

You can make it! You can escape, but only if
you go alone!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But...
choice_data_list: Go. You have to escape so you can win this.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I won't forget your sacrifice! I'll win for your sake!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Captured Female Participant A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! It looks like all the zombies are going after
the last pers—what the heck! Isn't that Fuji
Kiseki?!

text_block_list.name: Captured Female Participant B
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what? Oh my gosh, it really is her! She's
running like mad!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

Fuji Kiseki lets out a final burst of speed and
narrowly avoids the zombie hoard's grasp! She
slips by them and wins!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I did it! Those zombies were so fast, I nearly
got caught.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, but I couldn't have done it without the
spell you cast on me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Don't you remember? You said, "You can make
it!"

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Don't you remember? You said, "You can make
it!"

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: After hearing those words, I knew I had to make it. You had so much faith in me, I couldn't let you down.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Your words literally have a magical power
over me!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
They gave me so much more strength than I
could've ever imagined. I'm invincible so long as
you're with me!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I could run to the literal ends of the
world with a single magical word of
encouragement from you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Or something like that. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
In any case, this was such a fun event! We should
do it again sometime.

Fuji Kiseki and I plan our next outing together
while slowly making our way home.
